name: Slow-Cooked Pepper Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into 3-inch strips; brown in oil in a skillet.
2. Transfer to a slow cooker.
3. Combine the next seven ingredients; pour over beef.
4. Cover and cook on low for 5-6 hours or until meat is tender.
5. Add tomatoes and green peppers; cook on low for 1 hour longer.
6. Combine the cold water and cornstarch to make a paste; stir into liquid in slow cooker.
7. Cook on high until thickened.
8. Serve over noodles or rice.
